title: Chaitanya Patil
description: Portfolio updates, projects, and engineering insights from Chaitanya Patil.

items.title: StreetBite — Street Food Discovery Platform
items.content_text: Full-stack street food discovery platform with vendor loyalty, community forums, and real-time geolocation. Built with React, Spring Boot, and MySQL.

items.title: Focus Arena — Gamified Productivity RPG
items.content_text: RPG-inspired productivity app with quest systems, boss battles, and guild raids. Built with Next.js, .NET 8, SignalR, and MySQL.

items.title: ScamSentry — AI-Powered Scam Detection
items.content_text: Real-time scam detection engine analyzing URLs, emails, and phone numbers using ML classifiers and threat intelligence APIs.

items.content_text: Chaitanya Patil's portfolio — Full Stack Developer specializing in Java, Spring Boot, React, and .NET.
